name: com.dentalclinic.appointment.application.usecase.DeactivateAppointmentUseCase
comment: Deactivates a Appointment record

name: com.dentalclinic.appointment.application.usecase.GetAppointmentByIdUseCase
comment: Retrieves a Appointment by its identifier

name: com.dentalclinic.appointment.application.usecase.ListAllAppointmentsUseCase
comment: Returns a paginated, searchable list of Appointment records

name: com.dentalclinic.appointment.application.usecase.RegisterAppointmentUseCase
comment: Registers a new Appointment in the system

name: com.dentalclinic.appointment.application.usecase.UpdateAppointmentUseCase
comment: Updates an existing Appointment

name: com.dentalclinic.config.AsyncConfig
comment: Enables asynchronous event listeners (e.g. email notifications). Events are processed in a separate thread to avoid blocking the main request.

name: com.dentalclinic.config.CacheConfig
comment: Caffeine cache configuration. Caches frequently-read, infrequently-changed data (entities by ID, dashboard stats). TTL: 5 minutes. Max size: 500 entries per cache.

name: com.dentalclinic.config.MessageSourceConfig
comment: Configures Spring MessageSource for i18n. Loads messages from classpath:messages.properties (ES default) and messages_en.properties. Uses Accept-Language HTTP header to select the active locale.

name: com.dentalclinic.config.NotificationEventListener
comment: Listens to domain events and sends email notifications. Uses MailHog in development (see application.properties).

name: com.dentalclinic.config.RateLimitFilter
comment: Rate limiting filter using Bucket4j (token bucket algorithm). Limits each IP to 100 requests per minute on API endpoints. Returns HTTP 429 Too Many Requests when the limit is exceeded.

methods.name: keycloakJwtConverter
methods.comment: Extracts realm_access.roles from Keycloak JWT and maps them to Spring GrantedAuthority objects so @PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')") works.

name: com.dentalclinic.config.WebSocketConfig
comment: WebSocket configuration using STOMP over SockJS. Clients connect to /ws, subscribe to /topic/notifications.

name: com.dentalclinic.dentist.application.usecase.DeactivateDentistUseCase
comment: Deactivates a Dentist record

name: com.dentalclinic.dentist.application.usecase.GetDentistByIdUseCase
comment: Retrieves a Dentist by its identifier

name: com.dentalclinic.dentist.application.usecase.RegisterDentistUseCase
comment: Registers a new Dentist in the system

name: com.dentalclinic.dentist.application.usecase.UpdateDentistUseCase
comment: Updates an existing Dentist

name: com.dentalclinic.invoice.application.usecase.DeactivateInvoiceUseCase
comment: Deactivates a Invoice record

name: com.dentalclinic.invoice.application.usecase.GetInvoiceByIdUseCase
comment: Retrieves a Invoice by its identifier

name: com.dentalclinic.invoice.application.usecase.ListAllInvoicesUseCase
comment: Returns a paginated, searchable list of Invoice records.

name: com.dentalclinic.invoice.application.usecase.RegisterInvoiceUseCase
comment: Registers a new Invoice in the system

name: com.dentalclinic.invoice.application.usecase.UpdateInvoiceUseCase
comment: Updates an existing Invoice

name: com.dentalclinic.patient.application.usecase.DeactivatePatientUseCase
comment: Deactivates a Patient record

name: com.dentalclinic.patient.application.usecase.GetPatientByIdUseCase
comment: Retrieves a Patient by its identifier

name: com.dentalclinic.patient.application.usecase.ListAllPatientsUseCase
comment: Returns all Patient records with pagination and search

name: com.dentalclinic.patient.application.usecase.RegisterPatientUseCase
comment: Registers a new Patient in the system

name: com.dentalclinic.patient.application.usecase.UpdatePatientUseCase
comment: Updates an existing Patient

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.AnamnesisController
comment: REST controller for patient anamnesis (medical history and health questionnaire). Round 30 — in-memory implementation. Wire with real repositories in production.

methods.name: getByPatient
methods.comment: GET /api/anamnesis/patient/{patientId} — get anamnesis for patient (404 if none)

methods.name: upsert
methods.comment: POST /api/anamnesis — create or update anamnesis (upsert by patientId)

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.AppointmentReminderScheduler
comment: Sends appointment reminder emails 24 hours before the scheduled time. Runs every hour via @Scheduled(cron). In production, track sent reminders in DB to avoid duplicates.

methods.name: sendReminders
methods.comment: Runs every hour. Override in subclass or via bean to inject real appointment data. This is the base implementation — wire with your AppointmentRepository.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.AuditLog
comment: Persists every CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE action for auditing purposes. Records who did what, when, and on which entity.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.AuditLogController
comment: REST endpoint for querying the audit log. Restricted to ADMIN role.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.AuditService
comment: Records audit events for domain entities. Call from use cases after successful state changes.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.CashRegisterController
comment: REST controller for daily cash reconciliation (Cuadre de Caja Diario). Round 35 - in-memory stub. Wire with real payment storage in production.

methods.name: ensureHistorySeeded
methods.comment: Build closed sessions for last 4 days (today is open)

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.ClinicLocationController
comment: REST controller for multi-clinic location management. Round 33 — in-memory implementation. Wire with real repositories in production.

methods.name: getDentists
methods.comment: GET /api/locations/{id}/dentists — list dentists at this location

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.ClinicalPhotosController
comment: REST controller for clinical photo gallery (before/after, X-rays, intraoral). Round 32 - in-memory implementation. Wire with real storage in production.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.ConsentController
comment: REST controller for managing informed consent forms (consentimientos informados). Round 27 — in-memory implementation. Wire with real repositories in production.

methods.name: listByPatient
methods.comment: GET /api/consents/patient/{patientId} — list consents for a patient

methods.name: create
methods.comment: POST /api/consents — create a new consent record

methods.name: getById
methods.comment: GET /api/consents/{id} — get a single consent by id

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.DocumentController
comment: Handles file uploads and downloads for any domain entity. Files are stored on disk by FileStorageService. Metadata is kept in memory (replace with DB persistence for production).

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.DomainEvent
comment: Marker interface for all domain events. Events are immutable records published after a state change.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.ExportService
comment: Generic export service for PDF and Excel. Usage: byte[] pdf  = exportService.toPdf("Patients", headers, rows); byte[] xlsx = exportService.toExcel("Patients", headers, rows);

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.FileStorageService
comment: Stores uploaded files on the local filesystem. Files are saved under: <upload-dir>/<entityType>/<entityId>/<uuid>_<originalName> In production replace with S3 / GCS / Azure Blob Storage.

methods.name: store
methods.comment: Stores a file and returns its stored filename (UUID prefix + original name).

methods.name: load
methods.comment: Returns the absolute path for a stored file.

methods.name: delete
methods.comment: Deletes a stored file. Returns true if the file existed and was deleted.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.Insurance
comment: Stores insurance/convenio data for a patient. One patient can have at most one active insurance record.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.NotificationMessage
comment: WebSocket notification payload sent to /topic/notifications.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.NotificationService
comment: Sends real-time notifications to WebSocket subscribers. Frontend listens on /topic/notifications.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.OnlineBookingController
comment: REST controller for public patient self-service online booking. Round 33 — fully public (no authentication required). In-memory store.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.PatientPortalController
comment: Public-facing patient portal endpoints. No authentication required — patients access using their patient ID. In production, wire with real repositories and validate patient identity.

methods.name: getAppointments
methods.comment: Returns the appointment history for a given patient. GET /api/portal/appointments?patientId={uuid} Stub implementation — replace with real repository query.

methods.name: requestAppointment
methods.comment: Accepts a new appointment request from a patient. POST /api/portal/appointments/request

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.PaymentController
comment: Payment history and point-of-sale (TPV) controller. Round 29 — in-memory stub; wire with real persistence in production.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.PrescriptionController
comment: Electronic prescriptions management. Requires ADMIN or DENTIST role. Uses in-memory stub storage — wire real repositories in production.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.ProductionReportController
comment: Business intelligence and production reports for the dental practice. All endpoints require ADMIN or DENTIST role. In production, wire with real JPA repositories for each aggregate.

methods.name: monthlyProduction
methods.comment: Monthly production summary. Replace stub with: SELECT SUM(i.amount), COUNT(i) FROM Invoice i WHERE i.createdAt BETWEEN :from AND :to GROUP BY MONTH(i.createdAt)

methods.name: byDentist
methods.comment: Production breakdown by dentist for a date range.

methods.name: topProcedures
methods.comment: Top procedures by revenue and frequency.

methods.name: revenueForecast
methods.comment: Revenue forecast based on accepted treatment plans.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.RecurringAppointmentController
comment: REST controller for recurring appointment series management. Round 36 — in-memory store with auto-generated occurrences.

methods.name: listByPatient
methods.comment: GET /api/recurring/patient/{patientId} — list recurring series for a patient

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.StockController
comment: Clinic supply and inventory management. Pre-populated with 15 realistic dental supplies. In production, replace in-memory store with a JPA repository.

name: com.dentalclinic.shared.WaitingRoomHandler
comment: WebSocket message handler for the waiting room feature. Frontend publishes to /app/waiting-room, server broadcasts to /topic/waiting-room.

methods.name: relay
methods.comment: Relay waiting room events (ADD, UPDATE, REMOVE) to all subscribers. In production, persist queue state to DB for recovery on restart.

name: com.dentalclinic.treatment.application.usecase.DeactivateTreatmentUseCase
comment: Deactivates a Treatment record

name: com.dentalclinic.treatment.application.usecase.GetTreatmentByIdUseCase
comment: Retrieves a Treatment by its identifier

name: com.dentalclinic.treatment.application.usecase.ListAllTreatmentsUseCase
comment: Returns a paginated, searchable list of Treatment records.

name: com.dentalclinic.treatment.application.usecase.RegisterTreatmentUseCase
comment: Registers a new Treatment in the system

name: com.dentalclinic.treatment.application.usecase.UpdateTreatmentUseCase
comment: Updates an existing Treatment
